textByHashes.5e7969f4240c5024ddb1b94d36220fae04743f8b: I'm Aurel, the village store owner.
textByHashes.a2caa98d73c6b4d2f5c67f37c930b7e74f250f89: I'm sorry my friend, but I cannot open a store which has no stock.
textByHashes.b64630a525f92256be1742d4e2e5df7e1feba353: Yeah, what can I do ya for?
textByHashes.3d7413fd6dad73b977b2aa6b08ef68507a2bcb89: Hi there. You've done a good job on my store! It's starting to look great!
textByHashes.68c6eda7801b0665bd638e0c0fd1905677625a07: It's barely a town. I mean, not exactly a breeding ground for high society is it?
textByHashes.1d5bc864edd7bca11bc532718b68aab4bbf97343: At least we can hide from the vampyres here though. Hopefully we can start to get things up and running soon. You know, some of the trappings of normal life.
textByHashes.0b6190d5b0d404f8f8a4bee8c37eede5fe332e0a: It's looking better since you fixed my store, that's for sure. It would be good to get some stock in as well though.
textByHashes.9a7a20afd7c22c9e5dad56b4f11d0a7d30ec855b: Just some basic commodities, nothing too fancy like.
textByHashes.c65171ead4e5432f01155b09c32536219820f23d: We managed to escape from Meiyerditch where we were being farmed as food for the vampyres.
textByHashes.868b0020f5b2829fa7d2c9430ae3d72911247fd2: That's right. It's part of the Sanguinesti region to the east of here.
textByHashes.d8a958b727aa7025888960c46cdf374f41c02c21: Oh, that's very kind of you!
textByHashes.7eb2894754ede3f96c84cc4c8c47f2ab68ae45de: Perhaps you would consider helping to fix up my general store. It certainly could do with sorting out.
textByHashes.950072d867d86528f268416405540e5716c2a2d5: Please can you fix the roof, then the walls. Once that's done, come and have a chat with me regarding the stores stock.
textByHashes.a9d902002018329f2d0bc4608f44eef17b19419e: Yes I know. You said you'd help fix up my general store!
textByHashes.b0bd7e918f9babf9f6ecf5a7eac986f57c71c1f1: Well, I'm not sure. Could you take a look at the roof and then look at the walls. Once you've done that come and have a chat with me.
textByHashes.a7fd9c18afc3b3bc4449784fe281ce7cc1976044: I thought you were fixing up my general store? First fix the roof, then the walls. After that, come and have a chat with me.
textByHashes.c4595e9fbe87b1aca1c12cb57aaa5fea1d32fdde: Well you could stock the store for us. We'd really start looking like a town then.
textByHashes.0b6f952e65a542d61eae007a81f25ffc80cfa7e6: I need 3 tinderboxes, 10 snails of any type/raw mackerel and 10 bronze axes.
textByHashes.c10a8b084a4a18e4a2c7d9a233079821880efdbe: There you go. You can put them in that.
textByHashes.78732235c35440d27aed259309ec346254c9accf: You need to collect 10 bronze axes, 10 snails of any type and 3 tinderboxes.
textByHashes.cb061603e9fad11517ccc13e3fb5e34513b25e7f: You need to collect 10 bronze axes, 10 raw mackerel and 3 tinderboxes.
textByHashes.f02773c7ee36d36ce4b63f16bd596787de37f8cb: Wow, that's fantastic. Well done! You're doing a great job.
textByHashes.69453ccaea898b0a25ac405219b936870e6540b7: Hey, you've done such a great job for me. Would you consider helping us fix up the bank as well?
textByHashes.ccf1a649acfdd6879a13a31b2e83822cb7032d2e: Well done big shot! The smoke from the furnace attracted Gadderanks and his juvinates!
textByHashes.4c426bc984377eb200406ce8120d85e78a168d0c: Ha! In your dreams. He's right here if you want to give it a go. It's your funeral though!
textByHashes.49bfabfa5d54cf42f07d9ff5fd5980c6deacc535: Hey there! Gadderanks dropped this warhammer, I guess it belongs to you now!
textByHashes.d5d2aee7dd853c06b12a741ed95cc62f40829f44: Hey it's the hero! Thank you so much for saving us from Gadderanks. And the town is looking lovely as well. You've done a great job!
textByHashes.f6205b9a73ea29f6652985307c5cfc95ada9bf52: I'm Aurel the village store owner.
textByHashes.e60b9b7a076ef98c181f3236654c3cafa131c312: It's just perfect, thanks so much for your efforts.
textByHashes.39f006d0b329bd1c0331657fa80a2ddad292768b: Oh, not much really, we're all still hiding from the vampyres and eking out a living from this terrible place, hopefully soon we'll be strong enough to make the journey to the temple on the Salve.
textByHashes.97ab1bf5af457dc2155d63e388f89894e9107388: Not as far as I know, we have some basic amenities now which is so very useful, we're all incredibly grateful to you. I've never really seen or known a hero before, so I have nothing to compare one to, but I suspect in
textByHashes.c0a1f52b4d91c5e5df0eed8df55a9ffd1c8ac4e6: most people's judgement, you would be one! I for one am very pleased to have met you.
textByHashes.3ca7b1938af62e7781a471f9c571567ca393c71c: Hmm, how careless of you! However, you're in luck! Someone found it earlier and sold it to me.
textByHashes.5d3453576e861207529e124c9fb2511a5a335a0f: Now I can pass the hammer back to you for the remarkably cheap price of 3000 gold coins. Deal?
textByHashes.0c68d6ce5bad76683c2cb011b412d386898518dc: So that means you can't have it then! Come back when you have 3000 coins.
textByHashes.32b40df73639c317100bc4b3fe26b2eaf1c22681: A good deal and I'm sure of it!
textByHashes.3e478833362c8b315d5ccc82a4c8ce2f8e214049: Very good then! I'll have no guilty conscience in offering it to other adventurers that frequent my shop then. Many thanks for your time and good day to ya sir.
textByHashes.5413e0bbbacae38bb8e23f2d217b6a4f5a6b3474: So much! That's cheap! The adventurer I bought it from wanted twice as much but I managed to knock him down to a reasonable price.
